SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-08-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ERIC MOODY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VAN NESS HAYES ASSOCIATES, LLC DBA 150 VAN NESS AP DBA 150 VAN NESS APARTMENTS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HIBA HAMMADI, PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. PER THE COURT PROOF OF SERVICE IS SOUND. PARTIES INFORMED THE COURT THAT A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS PENDING. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. IF NO APPEARANCES THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN CONSUELLA LAMBERT; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ERIC MOODY. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT VAN NESS HAYES ASSOCIATES LLC. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
